title: Wilhelm
text:
Wilhelm may refer to:

People and fictional characters
C. Wilhelm, costume designer known professionally as "Wilhelm"
Wilhelm (name), a list of people and fictional characters with the given name or surname

Other uses
Wilhelm (name), disambiguation page for people named Wilhelm
Wilhelm II (1858–1941), king of Prussia and emperor of Germany from 1888 until his abdication in 1918.
Mount Wilhelm, the highest mountain in Papua New Guinea
Wilhelm Archipelago, Antarctica
Wilhelm (crater), a lunar crater
Wilhelm scream, stock sound effect used in many movies and shows
